title: ArcCloseAuthoringResolved payload
description: Emitted by the unreviewed-fallback sweep (chain arc-close-decision-authoring-split T5/T7) when it resolves a session's staged body-heavy decisions. One event per sweep that resolved at least one staged decision. Carries the author-vs-fallback split: authored_count = staged decisions the in-session agent authored (a matching artifact existed), fallback_forged_count = staged decisions the agent never authored, so Qwen's retained draft was forged flagged unreviewed. The author-vs-fallback RATE = authored_count / (authored_count + fallback_forged_count) over a window is the seat-strength instrument: how drivable the authoring reflex is per seat/model. Per telemetry-conventions, only meaningful after warmup (enough staged decisions accumulated).

session_id.description: Session whose staged decisions this sweep resolved. Joins back to the ArcCloseFilingReviewed fires (same session_id) that staged them.

authored_count.description: Staged decisions the agent authored: a matching artifact (knowledge_pointers vault note / MemoryWritten entry) existed at sweep time, so the fallback was suppressed and the staging row transitioned to 'authored'. The numerator of the author-vs-fallback rate.

fallback_forged_count.description: Staged decisions the agent never authored by the trigger (session end / grace expiry): Qwen's retained draft was forged flagged unreviewed+qwen-authored so capture was not lost. The fallback half of the rate.

rows_marked.description: Count of pending_decisions rows transitioned out of 'staged' by this sweep (authored or fallback_forged). Diagnostic; a row may carry multiple staged decisions.
